Completed the technical handover documentation for SPESTG-480 DIA exception notification flow.

The Confluence page documents the implemented DIA exception notification behavior, including:
- High-level DIA ingestion and exception notification flow
- Covered exception scenarios
- Missing DIA file after 7 AM NZT
- Invalid encrypted file content
- Decryption failure coverage
- Dataverse staging save failure after retry exhaustion
- Valid DIA file happy path
- D365 email notification behavior
- TPC Log traceability and Regarding link
- Confirmed Dataverse logical names used by the implementation
- DEV validation and unit test summary

This documentation was created to support QA/demo alignment, sprint close, and technical handover for future support after the team transition.
